# MyPrayerTower

> **Summary:** MyPrayerTower is a comprehensive "Digital Sanctuary" designed to help believers deepen their faith through contemplative prayer, community intercession, and sacred traditions. It creates a space for stillness and connection with God.

## Core Mission
To provide a sacred digital space where Catholics worldwide can pause, pray, and unite in faith, supported by features that encourage stillness and reflection.

## Key Features & Tools

### Daily Spiritual Journey
- **Daily Readings:** Gospel readings and reflections (Matthew, Mark, Luke, John).
- **Saint of the Day:** Biographies and inspiration from the lives of Saints.
- **Daily Examen:** Guided evening reflections and night prayers.

### Prayer & Community
- **Prayer Wall:** A global community feature to share intentions and pray for others.
- **Virtual Candles:** Light virtual candles for intentions (3, 7, or 30-day options).
- **Live Prayer Sessions:** Real-time participation in the Rosary, Divine Mercy Chaplet, and Novenas.
- **Mass Offerings:** Request Holy Masses for special intentions or the repose of souls.

### Utilities & Services
- **Church Finder:** A directory to locate Catholic churches and Mass times globally.
- **Digital Chapels:** Permanent tribute pages for loved ones, serving as virtual sanctuaries for remembrance.
- **QR Code Integration:** Scannable codes for gravestones linking to digital memorials.

## Platform Details
- **Target Audience:** Catholics, Christian Believers, Prayer Groups, Parishes.
- **Platform Type:** Web Application, Mobile App (iOS & Android).
- **Membership:** Free and Premium tiers available.

## Important Links
- **Home:** https://myprayertower.com/
- **Prayer Wall:** https://myprayertower.com/prayers/
- **Church Finder:** https://myprayertower.com/churches/
- **Memorials:** https://myprayertower.com/memorials/
- **Contact:** https://myprayertower.com/contact-us/
